headline: Big Sky Medical Accelerates Investment Activity in Big Sky Fund III with the Acquisition of RidgeWood Medical Center I & II
summary: The San Antonio acquisition marks the third and fourth properties acquired through Big Sky Fund III since its launch in December 2025 SAN ANTONIO, July 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Big Sky Medical is pleased to announce the acquisition of RidgeWood Medical Center I & II, a premier two-building medical outpatient campus located in San Antonio, Texas. The acquisition adds buildings three and four to Big Sky Fund III, the firm's open-ended evergreen fund launched in December 2025. This transaction

headline: UnitedHealthcare Launches New Spending Account Benefit, Putting More Choice in the Hands of Consumers
summary: July 09, 2026--UnitedHealthcare has introduced a Lifestyle Spending Account (LSA), an employer-sponsored benefit that gives companies a flexible way to help fund and support their employees’ individual health and well-being goals. When offered by an employer, the LSA is designed to help empower people to personalize their experience and shop for products and services to complement their other employer-sponsored benefits at any time.

headline: UnitedHealth Is Emerging From Its Worst Crisis in Decades. Here's What History Says Is Coming Next.
summary: The health insurer's stock price is up 61% since April.
